Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, min(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__min" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/9c37df04172640de783d48c1577c081f3b3bf752ec0a01f1e1bc0bf9150a53ad/4e46c740-2746-4c98-9461-e7ccf81300eb/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
